name: Advanced Rate Limiting (Upstash)
description: Implement distributed rate limiting using Upstash Redis and the @upstash/ratelimit library. Supports sliding window, fixed window, and token bucket algorithms. Works in Edge Runtime, Vercel Functions, and traditional servers.

steps.description: Install Upstash rate limiter and Redis client
Create rateLimiter with sliding window (10 req/10s) and separate limits for auth endpoints (5/60s)
Create rate limiting middleware using limiter.limit(identifier) where identifier is IP or userId
Apply rate limiting in Next.js middleware before route handling
Add UPSTASH_REDIS_REST_URL and UPSTASH_REDIS_REST_TOKEN from Upstash console

metadata.author: agentgram
metadata.tagline: Per-user rate limits with Redis — survives horizontal scaling and serverless
